It’s a high-performance market where quality, credibility and relationships genuinely matter, and where the work you do has a direct impact on how some of the most sophisticated businesses in the world are built.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We’ve spent the last 15+ years building a platform that allows people to operate at a high level - with warm, active mandates across long-standing hedge fund and trading clients, alongside some of the most interesting fintech and AI firms. The model is delivery-focused and genuinely meritocratic, with strong incentives, real autonomy across clients, roles and regions, and no internal barriers to doing good work.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We operate globally across London, New York and Dubai, and as a relatively small team, there’s real opportunity to make an impact and shape your own progression - whether that’s staying hands-on, building a team, or developing deeper client relationships.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If you’d be open to a conversation, now or in the future, feel free to drop me a message.<!----></span>

<!---->
      <span class="break-words
          tvm-parent-container">
<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Why I believe in a strong V Shape bounce for Dubai and Abu Dhabi similar to 2021. The fundamentals haven’t changed in the UAE.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->At<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/durlston-partners/" data-test-app-aware-link=""><span><span><!---->Durlston Partners<!----></span></span></a><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>in Dubai, we have been coming into the office every single day since the conflict began and every single day we have been speaking to our clients; hedge funds, sovereign wealth funds and family offices.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We remain 100% committed to Dubai, Abu Dhabi and the whole region. This is the same for at least 80%+ of the people I speak to.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->The fundamentals haven’t changed: great leadership that serves the people, with intention, with calmness, urgency and vision.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->The Dubai + Abu Dhabi reserves sit at $2.9 Trillion, that’s 100x the annual budget so the UAE could run the state tax free for 100 years!<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Dubai will have a whole new image when this is over and will attract even more great people and investment.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Just like the US attracted the most positive and hardworking people globally, over 100 years ago, the UAE is now doing the same. <!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->2 weeks to go until the Paris Marathon… training has not been enjoyable, but it’s nothing compared to what some of the animals I’m fundraising for have been through, which is a pretty good motivator to keep running.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->I’m running the Paris Marathon this April to raise money for Elephant Nature Park / Save Elephant Foundation, an organisation I’ve volunteered with multiple times over the years.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->They rescue abused and captive elephants and give them space to recover in a natural environment, but they also rescue and care for thousands of other animals - dogs from floods and dog meat farms, disabled dogs, cats, buffalo, cows rescued from slaughter and many more. They also run a hospital for elephants, dogs and cats and support animals from outside the park as well.<!----><span><br></span><!---->Importantly, they also work with local communities to move away from elephant riding and trekking camps by creating ethical tourism and alternative income sources, which is how long-term change actually happens.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If anyone would like to support, donate or share, I would be hugely grateful.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->All funds will be transferred directly to Save Elephant Foundation after the marathon.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Thanks very much for reading.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Video:<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/daniel-frugtniet-hagen-a4943719b/" id="ember8405" class="ember-view"><!---->Daniel Frugtniet Hagen<!----></a></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>making my do intervals last week!<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://lnkd.in/euZ9ZpKi" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->https://lnkd.in/euZ9ZpKi<!----></a></span>

<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->We receive a high volume of messages and applications through the Durlston Partners website and LinkedIn page every day.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We really appreciate that a lot of people are looking for new opportunities at the moment, and the team does try to respond and have speculative conversations where possible. That said, many of our clients have very specific requirements, and there are only so many hours in the day, so the team has to prioritise candidates who are most aligned with live roles.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If you see a role on our website or LinkedIn that you feel is a good fit, please feel free to send a follow up email to<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="mailto:hello@durlstonpartners.com" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->hello@durlstonpartners.com<!----></a><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>with your CV, a short summary of what you have been doing, and the types of roles and firms you would be interested in. <!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Had an amazing time in Morzine / Avoriaz last week ⛷️<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Only my second time skiing and some of my friends are basically pros, but I managed to keep up (sort of), had far fewer falls than last year, and even made it down a few reds!<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->I avoided skiing for years because everyone else had been going since they were children and I didn’t want to be the one slowing everyone down. Very glad I finally decided to just start anyway. It’s always a bit uncomfortable going into something new where everyone else seems ahead, but it usually pays off.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Which probably links quite nicely to careers too.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Sometimes the best decisions are the slightly scary ones - moving companies, moving cities, changing markets, trying something you’re not 100% sure you’re ready for yet.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If you’re thinking about a new adventure, we’re hiring at Durlston Partners across London, Dubai and New York.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Durlston Partners is a specialist tech and trading search firm working across quant, tech, data, AI/ML and digital assets, partnering with hedge funds, trading firms, asset managers and fintechs globally. We’ve built a genuinely collaborative, high-performing platform with warm desks, strong client relationships and plenty of opportunity to grow, bill well and have a good time along the way.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If you’re curious about what a move might look like, always happy to have an off-the-record chat.<!----></span>

<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Had an epic (literally) week of music last week and just feeling very grateful. Mainly coming on here to tell everyone to go and see EPIC: Elvis Presley in Concert because… wow. Honestly wow. Whether you love Elvis, think you hate Elvis, don’t care about Elvis, or know nothing about him - go and see it in the cinema.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Somehow managed to get tickets to the Harry Styles one-night-only gig on Fri that was filmed for Netflix - SO good... no phones allowed, only disposable cameras which gave 90s nostalgia (the photos are… not great).<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->And then ABBA Voyage on Saturday, which I’d seen before but is still completely mind-blowing. It genuinely feels like you’re at an ABBA concert.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Anyway... an amazing week of music. Slightly random LinkedIn post but sometimes it’s nice to share the things that make life good.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Normal work posts resume tomorrow… 🎶<!----></span>
      </span>

      <span class="break-words
          tvm-parent-container">
<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Could an off-the-record chat be one of the small, good choices you make this year?<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->This is pinned on our office fridge. I must open fridge about 10 times a day (usually when<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/marcus-osborne/" id="ember9044" class="ember-view"><!---->Marcus<!----></a></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>has hidden office treats from himself in there and I go and find them…), but every now and then I actually notice it.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Choosing a new role doesn’t feel like a small choice at the time. It’s a big one. There’s risk, unknowns, trade-offs.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->I remember when I joined DP, I had a couple of strong offers on the table. DP was the only “unknown” route - I’d worked in the finance space but never in recruitment. It felt like a big leap and (to be honest) slightly too good to be true. Nearly six years later, it’s more than lived up to expectations.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Of course it hasn’t all been smooth sailing, there have been challenges and growing pains, but I’m so proud of where the team is today and incredibly grateful for the opportunities I’ve been given.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->I’m ambitious, hardworking and yes, motivated by earning well. But I also love my life... my friends, family, travelling the world, eating incredible food (arguably some of the best places I’ve ever eaten have been with DP). DP has given me the balance of having a role that stretches and rewards me financially, while still allowing me to actually enjoy life. Somehow I managed 15 countries last year and have already ticked off 3 this year.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Recruitment isn’t easy... you have to be good to earn well. But at DP we give people a platform, warm desks, real access and the opportunity to fly. What you do with it is up to you.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If you’re not happy where you are, and you’re craving more opportunity, balance, and reward, could an off-the-record chat be one of the small, good choices you make this year?<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->My inbox is open :)<!----></span>
      </span>
    </div>

<!---->
      <span class="break-words
          tvm-parent-container">
<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->8 weeks to go until the Paris Marathon… help 😅 It got very real this weekend with a 24km run, and I’ve got long runs planned every weekend from now until race day.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->This April, I’m running 26.2 miles for Elephant Nature Park / Save Elephant Foundation - an organisation I’ve volunteered with three times since 2018.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->ENP rescues sick and abused captive elephants and gives them space to heal in a natural environment. They also work directly with local communities to end elephant trekking and riding by creating ethical, sustainable alternatives.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->What many people don’t realise is that a huge number of so-called “sanctuaries” still exploit elephants. ENP is one of the very few that puts animal welfare above tourism.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->At their main park they care not only for rescued elephants, but also: 750 dogs saved from floods, dog meat farms and the streets (including 70+ disabled dogs given a second chance), 2,000+ cats, buffalo, cows rescued from slaughter, birds - and almost any animal they can help<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->They have just built a hospital treating elephants, dogs and cats, including animals from outside the park too!<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->The heartbreaking truth is that almost every working elephant has endured “The Crush” (Pajan) - a brutal process designed to break their spirit through isolation, starvation and beatings. When you see a “calm” elephant giving rides or performing, it isn’t obedience, it’s fear.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If you’d like to support, donate or share, I’d be hugely grateful.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->As ENP is based in Thailand and not supported on UK fundraising platforms, I’m collecting via GoFundMe and will withdraw and transfer the funds directly to Save Elephant Foundation after the marathon.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Thank you for reading 🤍<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://lnkd.in/e4fZQ5Yz" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->https://lnkd.in/e4fZQ5Yz<!----></a></span>
      </span>
    </div>
  
          <button role="button" class="feed-shared-inline-show-more-text__see-more-less-toggle see-more t-14 t-black--light t-normal hoverable-link-text feed-shared-inline-show-more-text__dynamic-more-text feed-shared-inline-show-more-text__dynamic-bidi-text" aria-label="see more, visually reveals content which is already detected by screen readers" style="left:153.890625px" type="button">
          <span>…more</span>

      <span class="break-words
          tvm-parent-container">
<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->This April, I’m running the Paris Marathon to raise funds for Elephant Nature Park / Save Elephant Foundation 🐘<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://lnkd.in/gext5ZPZ" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->https://lnkd.in/gext5ZPZ<!----></a><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->I ran my first half marathon around London this weekend and it was… a shock to the system 😅 but it’s lit the fire to train hard and put those miles towards something that matters.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Elephant Nature Park rescues elephants who’ve suffered unimaginable cruelty and works to end elephant riding and trekking by supporting ethical, community-led alternatives. They also care for hundreds of rescued dogs, cats, and other animals - and are about to run a hospital treating animals in need across the region.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Most working elephants have endured “The Crush” - a brutal process designed to break their spirit. ENP exists to stop that cycle, every single day.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If you’re able to donate, share, or learn more, it genuinely makes a difference. Thank you 🤍<!----></span>
      </span>
    </div>

    <div class="feed-shared-inline-show-more-text
        feed-shared-update-v2__description feed-shared-inline-show-more-text--minimal-padding

    <div class="update-components-text relative update-components-update-v2__commentary " dir="ltr">
<!---->
      <span class="break-words
          tvm-parent-container">
<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->We're growing and hiring across our London and Dubai offices.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->One of the main reasons people join us and what surprises them most during interviews is the level of trust and respect we have for each other. We don't operate in a cutthroat way.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We hear horror stories during interviews about practices at other competitors. Someone who recently joined us shared that at their previous firm, just two months after they'd placed a candidate at a market maker, their colleague secretly contacted that same candidate trying to poach them for another placement to collect a fee.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->This kind of behaviour makes you look incompetent and it damages your reputation for short-sighted gain. But you can’t be blamed if you’re incentivised to do this.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If your firm incentivises you to undercut your colleagues like this, they don't care about you or the quality of service you provide.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->By comparison, a few years ago I saw an SRE on our system that<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/marcus-osborne/" id="ember9553" class="ember-view"><!---->Marcus Osborne<!----></a></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>had previously worked with and met for coffee. This was one of those "attach the invoice" to the intro candidates.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->The candidate hadn't been contacted in three months. According to our ownership rules, relationships expire after two months, so technically this candidate was fair game and I could have taken over with no issues. Instead, I gave Marcus a heads up (as painful as that was) and sure enough, he placed the candidate a few weeks later for a sizable fee.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Why do we operate this way? The favors get repaid. It reduces friction and tension within the team. People stay with the company longer. It's how we build something sustainable!<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Screenshot attached of that painful but rewarding exchange with Marcus<!----></span>
      </span>
    </div>
  
          <button role="button" class="feed-shared-inline-show-more-text__see-more-less-toggle see-more t-14 t-black--light t-normal hoverable-link-text feed-shared-inline-show-more-text__dynamic-more-text feed-shared-inline-show-more-text__dynamic-bidi-text" aria-label="see more, visually reveals content which is already detected by screen readers" style="left:413.6875px" type="button">

<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Hope everyone’s had a great start to 2026. I’m spending the final week of my travels volunteering at Elephant Nature Park, a place very close to my heart. They rescue and rehabilitate sick and injured elephants from trekking, logging and circus environments, work closely with local communities on education, and help liberate elephants through saddle-off projects. It’s an incredibly special place, a very wholesome way to reset before heading back into the year.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Feeling refreshed, grateful, and ready to throw myself back into work next week - followed shortly by a trip to Dubai with the London team to celebrate a strong 2025 and kick off what’s shaping up to be an exciting year ahead :)<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If anyone is interested to hear more about ENP, I wrote a blog on my 2018/19 experiences here:<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://lnkd.in/gH7BfpVY" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->https://lnkd.in/gH7BfpVY<!----></a></span>

    <div style="" tabindex="-1">
          <a tabindex="-1" href="/feed/update/urn:li:activity:7400952331355447297/" id="ember9740" class="tap-target update-components-mini-update-v2__link-to-details-page text-body-medium ember-view">
            
    <div class="feed-shared-inline-show-more-text
        feed-shared-update-v2__description feed-shared-inline-show-more-text--minimal-padding

    <div class="update-components-text relative update-components-update-v2__commentary " dir="ltr">
<!---->
      <span class="break-words
          tvm-parent-container">
<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Protect your time, invest in you and give yourself permission to step outside the business world now and then.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Over the last six years, I’ve been fortunate to go on annual adventures with my eldest daughter, and those trips have completely reshaped how I think about work, life and what really matters. We’ve slept in huts at a rhino orphanage, climbed mountains in the dark to catch the first light of sunrise, explored animal reserves in several countries and wandered through hundreds of historic sites together. Each experience has been a powerful reminder that the moments we remember most rarely happen in a meeting room.<!----><span><br></span><!---->For most of these countries, I had already been there “on business” flying in, staying in hotels, moving between offices and airports, yet never really seeing the place itself. The difference when you step outside the business bubble is extraordinary, the people you meet, the conversations you have, the food you try (including 15 very different biryanis in 17 days travelling the length of India!) and the perspective you gain by simply slowing down and being present with family.<!----><span><br></span><!---->The real message for me is this: travel is amazing, but if life becomes only about work, you might visit a country without ever truly seeing it. When you consciously protect time for family and personal adventures, the same world you fly through for business suddenly feels richer, warmer and far more human. Work-life balance is not a soft “nice to have” it is the foundation that lets both your career and your relationships thrive.<!----><span><br></span><!---->I’m grateful that I’m about to head off again with number one daughter, this time taking it a little easier on a cruise and focusing on time together rather than ticking off landmarks. And it doesn’t stop there: number two daughter and my wife (along with number one daughter) are off in the New Year to volunteer at an elephant sanctuary in Thailand, my wife’s sixth time returning to that project, which says everything about the impact these experiences can have.<!----><span><br></span><!---->As the year comes to a close, it feels like the right moment to say, protect your time, invest in you and give yourself permission to step outside the business world now and then.<!----><span><br></span><!---->Wishing you all a peaceful festive season, and wherever you are, be kind.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/shannon-palmer-18a3219a/" id="ember9741" class="ember-view"><!---->Shannon Palmer<!----></a></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span><!----><!----><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/harley-palmer-b2497064/" id="ember9742" class="ember-view"><!---->Harley Palmer<!----></a></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span><!----><!----><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/maureen-cori-8b5a41b/" id="ember9743" class="ember-view"><!---->Maureen Cori<!----></a></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span><!----><!----><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/tony-lugg-tce-digital-transformation-champion-15012018/" id="ember9744" class="ember-view"><!---->Tony Lugg TCE Digital       <span class="break-words
          tvm-parent-container">
<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->This month we hosted our latest Women at the Table event in partnership with<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/bluecove/" data-test-app-aware-link=""><span><span><!---->BlueCove<!----></span></span></a><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>- and what an inspiring evening it was.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Women across the tech and trading space joined us for an evening of conversation, connection, and insight.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->BlueCove - founded in 2018 as a scientific asset management firm bringing together leading investment and engineering professionals to research, develop and deploy state-of-the-art scientific investment processes in fixed income - kindly opened their doors and provided the perfect setting for the night.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We were incredibly fortunate to hear from three exceptional speakers from BlueCove:<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/rheapotdar/" id="ember10110" class="ember-view"><!---->Rhea Potdar<!----></a></span><!---->,<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/diana-fomina/" id="ember10111" class="ember-view"><!---->Diana Fomina, CFA<!----></a></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>&amp;<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/rachel-brown-9a4435109/" id="ember10112" class="ember-view"><!---->Rachel Brown<!----></a></span><!---->.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Events like this are exactly why Women at the Table exists - to create spaces where women across the investment and technology landscape can meet peers, learn from leaders, and feel seen, supported and celebrated.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->A huge thank you to the BlueCove team for partnering with us and to everyone who joined us!<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If you’d like to attend, collaborate, or get involved in the next event, drop us a note at<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="mailto:events@durlstonpartners.com" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->events@durlstonpartners.com<!----></a><!---->.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->&amp; don't forget to join our community:<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://lnkd.in/e8EXxtFm" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->https://lnkd.in/e8EXxtFm<!----></a></span>

<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Just two weeks to go until our next Women at the Table event in partnership with<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/bluecove/" data-test-app-aware-link=""><span><span><!---->BlueCove<!----></span></span></a><!---->.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We’re excited to announce our next speaker,<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/rachel-brown-9a4435109/" id="ember10504" class="ember-view"><!---->Rachel Brown<!----></a></span><!---->.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Rachel is an Engineer in BlueCove’s Quant Engineering team, where she plays a central role in shaping the firm’s data strategy. She has designed and implemented BlueCove’s Extract, Transform, and Load (ETL) pipeline for the firm’s Data Warehouse and works closely with teams across the business to unify data services that underpin investment and research processes. Before joining BlueCove in 2025, Rachel led the data function at Fulcrum Asset Management, overseeing a major transformation of the firm’s data ingestion, validation, and delivery pipelines. Prior to this, she worked as a data science consultant within HSBC’s Capital Finance and Investment Bank, and she began her career with an internship at Coutts &amp; Co, a UK-based private bank. Rachel holds an MEng in Engineering from Imperial College London.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We’re looking forward to hearing from Rachel and the other incredible women at BlueCove as they share their experiences and insights on the night.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->📅 Date &amp; Time: Tuesday 11th November, from 6pm<!----><span><br></span><!---->📍 Location: Mayfair, London<!----></span>

<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->You know Christmas is coming when the Regent Street angels go up ✨ (photo right outside of our office). Ready for the chaos of Christmas over the next few months… with the dark nights setting in early, the lights make the city feel a bit more magical.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->As ever, feeling lucky to work on one of the most iconic streets in London. The team are pushing for a super strong end to the year with plenty lined up for 2026 before switching off properly during the two weeks of bonus Christmas leave everyone gets.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->I’m taking a slightly longer break myself over Christmas, but between now and then I’m keen to speak with experienced recruiters in our space. We’ve got a ton of exciting stuff happening across London, Dubai, and New York - and a platform you can plug straight into and start billing big right away.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->At Durlston Partners, we’re a leading tech and trading search firm partnering with some of the world’s top hedge funds, HFTs, fintechs, prop shops, and asset managers, hiring across quant, tech, data, AI/ML, and digital assets.<!----><span><br></span><!---->We offer market-leading commission, no thresholds, caps, or desk fees, plus cash bonuses, profit share, and equity opportunity.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Desks are genuinely warm, relationships are deep, and our average fee per placement is high, with plenty of deals way north of six figures.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->All the usual good stuff in terms of benefits: two-week Christmas bonus break, health insurance, wellness allowance, team lunches, and global incentives - it’s a strong setup for ambitious recruiters.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Even if you’re not actively looking, always happy to have an informal chat. Prior to joining the firm in 2019, Rhea worked as a Software Engineer at Goldman Sachs from 2013 - 2019 in Controllers Technology and Investment Banking Technology, latterly as Vice President of Debt Capital Markets Technology. Rhea received her Masters of Engineering in Computer Science from Imperial College London in 2013.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Can’t wait to hear from her!<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->This evening will be a fantastic opportunity to reconnect with others in the space, meet new faces, and hear directly from some of the talented women in BlueCove’s Engineering and Quant Research teams as they share their technical insights and career journeys.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->💡 About BlueCove:<!----><span><br></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>Founded in 2018, BlueCove is a scientific asset management firm bringing together leading investment and engineering professionals to research, develop and deploy state-of-the-art scientific investment processes in fixed income management.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->📅 Date &amp; Time: Tuesday 11th November, from 6pm<!----><span><br></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>📍 Location: Mayfair, London<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We have a few spots left - email<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="mailto:events@durlstonpartners.com" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->events@durlstonpartners.com<!----></a><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>ASAP to register your interest.<!----></span>

<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Having spoken to countless engineers over the years, it’s clear that the best people don’t just want a job - they want a challenge.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->That’s one of the reasons I’ve enjoyed working closely with firms in the Trading (and now also Crypto and AI) space.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->These industries are unique. They demand world-class engineering, they move incredibly fast, and they constantly push people to think in ways they haven’t before. The bar is high, but so are the rewards.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->I’m currently working with a handful of elite firms in London hiring Python &amp; C++ Software Engineers.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->You’ll be exposed to high-performance systems where every millisecond counts, solving deep technical challenges with some of the brightest minds around. These environments are fast-paced, meritocratic, and your impact will be immediate.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->These firms are ideally looking for:<!----><span><br></span><!---->✔️ Strong academic background (e.g. Degrees/PhDs from top global universities)<!----><span><br></span><!---->✔️ Proven experience in demanding environments (Trading, Crypto, AI, start-ups, etc.)<!----><span><br></span><!---->✔️ A genuine passion for technology. Someone who doesn’t see the job as just writing code, but has an interest in solving problems, experimenting with new ideas, and pushing the limits of what’s possible<!----><span><br></span><!---->✔️ A mindset for impact<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If you’re interested, please feel free to reach out to me directly on LinkedIn, or email me:<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="mailto:david@durlstonpartners.com" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->david@durlstonpartners.com<!----></a><span><br></span><span><br></span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://lnkd.in/ewa3SMrc" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->https://lnkd.in/ewa3SMrc<!----></a></span>

One of those students reached out for coffee to talk through their next move. We explored a few directions and landed on one that felt right: an AI Engineer role at a hedge fund.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->They absolutely nailed the interview process and got the offer!<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Sometimes the best relationships take a couple of years to come full circle.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If you're graduating from<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/imperialcomputing/" data-test-app-aware-link=""><span><span><!---->Imperial College Computing<!----></span></span></a><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>and want to explore opportunities in Software Engineering or Quantitative Research across London, drop me a message!<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/durlston-partners/" data-test-app-aware-link=""><span><span><!---->Durlston Partners<!----></span></span></a></span>

<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->L is the letter of the week in London:  Legs, Limes and Lizzie Line (modes of transport) Loyle Carner (travel soundtrack) Leon (daily breakfast order for those who made it in)<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Lucky to live close to the Lizzie Line, which takes me straight into Bond Street - nice to see everyone out on the lime bikes in the sun, too. Managed a peaceful 5k around the Royal Parks at lunch - fewer tourists to dodge than usual, though dodging the mounds of lime bikes parked on every corner is a new skill.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Glass-half-full kind of gal, and it’s been an enjoyable, focused week so far in a slightly quieter office.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->The market certainly hasn’t slowed down - we’re busier than ever and hiring across Python, C++, Java, Rust, data, and DevOps, as well as quant researchers, strategists, and ML/AI specialists globally.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We’re also on the lookout for a quant recruiter for a growing systematic fund in the US and agency recruiters in London / Dubai / NY who want to plug into one of the strongest platforms in the market.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If that’s you (or someone you know), drop me a message - always happy to chat. <!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Kicked off the week with a 6k run into the office (a planned 2.5k to the Lizzie Line turned into a 6k detour thanks to TCR/Bond Street station closure 🙃). Beautiful morning for it though, and it ticks off run #1 of the week.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->For September, I’m aiming for 35k a week (about 5k a day) - managed 40k last week and even squeezed in a Bristol parkrun on a hen do (hen’s request, she’s a serious park-runner!).<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Lucky to get most of my kilometres in on my lunch breaks with the Royal Parks on our doorstep. Just as lucky to have a proper office set-up where I can work flat out during the day, then fully switch off in the evenings. <!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->We had the amazing<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><a tabindex="0" href="/in/parisnorriss/" id="ember11697" class="ember-view"><!---->Paris Norriss<!----></a></span><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>in the office last week for a talk on grit and resilience – and the team were hooked.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->In 2025, Paris broke records by running seven marathons across seven continents in just 5 days and 21 hours – despite having only ever run one marathon before. This came not long after he rowed 4,800km across the Pacific Ocean in 2023, raising £150,000 for marine conservation.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Through The Grit Code, Paris turns these extreme challenges into practical lessons on thriving under pressure, pushing limits, and staying resilient – themes that couldn’t be more relevant to the work we do at Durlston Partners.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->It was inspiring, motivating, and a great reminder that grit and determination are the foundation for success in every area of life.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->If your team could use a dose of perspective and motivation, I’d highly recommend reaching out to Paris.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><a <!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->What a fantastic turnout for our first run club last night! 🏃‍♂️🏃‍♀️💨<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->A huge thank you to everyone who joined and brought such great energy. <!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Tired of the same old networking events? Let's switch things up.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Here are the details for our first Durlston Partners Run Club, designed to connect the worlds of finance and technology.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->- 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗲: Wednesday, 20 August<!----><span><br></span><!---->- 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗲: 6:30pm<!----><span><br></span><!---->- 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗣𝗹𝗮𝗰𝗲: A scenic route around St James Park<!----><span><br></span><!---->- 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗩𝗶𝗯𝗲: All levels are welcome, whether you're a seasoned pro or just starting out.<!----><span><br></span><!---->- 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗚𝗼𝗮𝗹: Combine a bit of fitness with meeting like-minded people.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->This is your chance to lace up, break a sweat, and make some great connections outside of the office.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Ready to join?       <span class="break-words
          tvm-parent-container">
<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Back from 3 Weeks in Dubai – Regional Market Pulse<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->A quick update after spending the last few weeks on the ground in the UAE and speaking with clients across all regions.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->US:<!----><span><br></span><!---->Senior mandates remain active. We’re in deep conversations with PMs and researchers across macro, volatility, and systematic equities. Seeing more crossover between stat arb and applied AI — especially on intraday alpha and signal infra.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->UAE:<!----><span><br></span><!---->Big moves here. The GCC-wide Schengen-style tourist visa was just approved — a strong signal of regional coordination and growth. Add to that BlueCrest relocating key operations to the UAE, and you get a clear picture: this place is not just a hub, it’s the hub.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->And while the conflict a bit north has raised concerns across the broader region, the UAE has stayed neutral, resilient, and focused — continuing to position itself as a safe, forward-looking financial center. Markets are active, capital is flowing, and the momentum isn’t slowing.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Asia:<!----><span><br></span><!---->Hong Kong and Singapore are holding steady. An uptick in options trading mandates — delta-one, vol-focused, and everything in between. Firms are investing in execution upgrades and full-stack trading solutions. Also, live mandates across quant dev and mid-freq research.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Europe:<!----><span><br></span><!---->London and Paris remain busy. Demand is shifting toward multi-asset thinkers and systematic credit. Index rebalancing, ML overlays, and hybrid research+execution roles are coming up more frequently.<!----></span>
      </span>
    </div>

<!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->Just back from our Vegas incentive trip - a really lovely mix of wholesome and typical Vegas... from exploring Red Rock Canyon, Lake Mead and the Hoover Dam… to a pool party with Mau P, David Guetta at LIV, and a surprise intimate Bruno Mars performance at his Pinky Ring lounge in the Bellagio.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->What made this trip even more special? It wasn’t just for top billers. While we do reward high performance, we also celebrate consistency, collaboration, and those who go above and beyond, like our peer-nominated “Team Player/Unsung Hero” and “DPer of the Year.”<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We’re big believers in recognising hard work all year round. That means regular team lunches in the best spots across London, NY and Dubai, Deliveroo days, socials, and much more.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->And most importantly: our commission structure is one of the best in the market (up to 40% with no thresholds or desk fees), we have a generous BD incentive, and profit share.<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->We’re now looking to bring in experienced people from our space. If you're curious about joining a high-performing team that actually rewards hard work (and has a lot of fun along the way), drop me a message for a confidential <!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->💭 𝑹𝒆𝒇𝒍𝒆𝒄𝒕𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝒐𝒏 𝑾𝒐𝒎𝒆𝒏 𝒂𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑻𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒆 - 𝑺𝒑𝒓𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝟐𝟎𝟐𝟓 💭<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Last month,<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/durlston-partners/" data-test-app-aware-link=""><span><span><!---->Durlston Partners<!----></span></span></a><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>hosted our annual Spring<span class="white-space-pre"> </span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " tabindex="0" href="https://www.linkedin.com/search/results/all/?keywords=%23womenatthetable&amp;origin=HASH_TAG_FROM_FEED" data-test-app-aware-link=""><span class="visually-hidden">hashtag</span><span><span aria-hidden="true">#</span>WomenattheTable</span></a><span class="white-space-pre"> </span>event, and I can't stop thinking about it!<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->This time it was held in our office, giving it a uniquely intimate, safe &amp; warm feeling. <!---->        <span dir="ltr"><!---->At Women at the Table, Brooke Lear shared how mentorship can help build confidence, resilience, and perspective, and how it's not just something you benefit from later in your career. Even if you’re early on in your journey, you still have value to offer, whether that’s sharing your experience, listening with empathy, or just being a sounding board for someone else navigating a similar path. Mentorship is a two-way street, both mentor and mentee grow from the relationship. It encourages curiosity, accountability, and self-awareness.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><!---->Brooke reminded us that mentoring doesn’t always have to be formal - sometimes just offering a conversation or support over coffee can make a real difference.<!----><span><br></span><span><br></span><a class="xwxVfcRwnBUeGipgoiZPeKPJMrvzgAVqE " target="_self" tabindex="0" href="https://lnkd.in/eb9-cSGB" data-test-app-aware-link=""><!---->https://lnkd.in/eb9-cSGB<!----></a></span>
